items.title: S01E01 - Nellie Comes to Town
items.summary: Nellie, the straight-laced daughter of the landlord, takes over the management of the Brown Cow Pub when her father gets sick. Things are going fine until a property developer with plans for the pub comes by to buy the pub.

infolabels.title: Nellie Comes to Town
infolabels.plot: Nellie, the straight-laced daughter of the landlord, takes over the management of the Brown Cow Pub when her father gets sick. Things are going fine until a property developer with plans for the pub comes by to buy the pub.

items.title: S01E02 - Something in the Night
items.summary: Police reports of a burglar in the area alarms Nellie, and she wants to be prepared for the crime wave.

infolabels.title: Something in the Night
infolabels.plot: Police reports of a burglar in the area alarms Nellie, and she wants to be prepared for the crime wave.

items.title: S01E03 - The Anniversary Present
items.summary: The landlord Jed, meets another women on the anniversary of his wife's death, but she is Gladys the twice widowed women Nellie knows. Should Nellie get in the middle?

infolabels.title: The Anniversary Present
infolabels.plot: The landlord Jed, meets another women on the anniversary of his wife's death, but she is Gladys the twice widowed women Nellie knows. Should Nellie get in the middle?

items.title: S01E04 - The Restless Spirit
items.summary: Nellie contacts a spiritualist in an attempt to contact her late mother in the after life. She has an important question, and she needs an answer.

infolabels.title: The Restless Spirit
infolabels.plot: Nellie contacts a spiritualist in an attempt to contact her late mother in the after life. She has an important question, and she needs an answer.

items.title: S01E05 - The Apartment
items.summary: Nellie grows tired of living over the Brown Cow Pub, so she begins to look for an apartment. Her choices are not what she hoped.The only places she can find do not measure up.

infolabels.title: The Apartment
infolabels.plot: Nellie grows tired of living over the Brown Cow Pub, so she begins to look for an apartment. Her choices are not what she hoped.The only places she can find do not measure up.

items.title: S01E06 - The Wind of Change
items.summary: An executive from the Brewery dictates no more pints and crisps. They are going upmarket with wines and dinners. Nellie tries hard to go along with it, with the usual results.

infolabels.title: The Wind of Change
infolabels.plot: An executive from the Brewery dictates no more pints and crisps. They are going upmarket with wines and dinners. Nellie tries hard to go along with it, with the usual results.

items.title: S01E07 - Bring On the Dancing Girls
items.summary: The pub down the road has started live entertainment with go-go girls. All the regulars have gone there. Jed has an idea about how to lure them back, but will Nellie allow strippers?

infolabels.title: Bring On the Dancing Girls
infolabels.plot: The pub down the road has started live entertainment with go-go girls. All the regulars have gone there. Jed has an idea about how to lure them back, but will Nellie allow strippers?

items.title: S02E01 - Brief Encounter
items.summary: A childhood romance is rekindled while out shopping, and Nellie thinks she starts to hear wedding bells.

infolabels.title: Brief Encounter
infolabels.plot: A childhood romance is rekindled while out shopping, and Nellie thinks she starts to hear wedding bells.

items.title: S02E02 - High Society
items.summary: The desire for the high life has Nellie making some big changes in her life. Some of the changes mean a loss of friends.

infolabels.title: High Society
infolabels.plot: The desire for the high life has Nellie making some big changes in her life. Some of the changes mean a loss of friends.

items.title: S02E03 - Requiem for a Heavyweight
items.summary: A Pro wrestler, Battling Bill, moves to the district, but rubs some of the patons the wrong way.

infolabels.title: Requiem for a Heavyweight
infolabels.plot: A Pro wrestler, Battling Bill, moves to the district, but rubs some of the patons the wrong way.

items.title: S02E04 - Do Unto Others
items.summary: When Jed's friend dies, he takes a good hard look at himself. He vows to stop drinking and gambling, but it's Nellie who feels the strain of his changed nature.

infolabels.title: Do Unto Others
infolabels.plot: When Jed's friend dies, he takes a good hard look at himself. He vows to stop drinking and gambling, but it's Nellie who feels the strain of his changed nature.

items.title: S02E05 - The Lady with the Lamp
items.summary: When George suffers from exhaustion, Nellie must step in and nurse him back to good health. Gilbert is very upset when one of dress designs are turned down.

infolabels.title: The Lady with the Lamp
infolabels.plot: When George suffers from exhaustion, Nellie must step in and nurse him back to good health. Gilbert is very upset when one of dress designs are turned down.

items.title: S02E06 - Feeling the Draught
items.summary: The brewery's delivery men go out on strike for more beer money. This causes Nellie even more money problems.

infolabels.title: Feeling the Draught
infolabels.plot: The brewery's delivery men go out on strike for more beer money. This causes Nellie even more money problems.

items.title: S03E01 - Be Prepared
items.summary: Nellie's cousin Stanley joins the staff of the Brown Cow pub. Stanley wants to throw a huge party for dad, but obtaining the late night drinking license is really tricky.

infolabels.title: Be Prepared
infolabels.plot: Nellie's cousin Stanley joins the staff of the Brown Cow pub. Stanley wants to throw a huge party for dad, but obtaining the late night drinking license is really tricky.

items.title: S03E02 - A-Haunting we Will Go
items.summary: Stanley tries to get The Brown Cow in the tourist guide on haunted pubs, but he doesn't want to tell Nellie.

infolabels.title: A-Haunting we Will Go
infolabels.plot: Stanley tries to get The Brown Cow in the tourist guide on haunted pubs, but he doesn't want to tell Nellie.

items.title: S03E03 - The French Correction
items.summary: Nellie breaks her ankle, but her troubles are just beginning.

infolabels.title: The French Correction
infolabels.plot: Nellie breaks her ankle, but her troubles are just beginning.

items.title: S03E04 - Called to the Bar
items.summary: Stanley's antics leave him with a broken ankle. Now his inexperienced cousin Alf has to take over and step in as landlord.

infolabels.title: Called to the Bar
infolabels.plot: Stanley's antics leave him with a broken ankle. Now his inexperienced cousin Alf has to take over and step in as landlord.
